siteContent.heroSubtitle: Luxury real estate development across California's most coveted addresses.
siteContent.aboutText: SITED Development Group is a boutique real estate development firm specializing in architecturally significant residential and mixed-use properties across California. With over two decades of experience, we transform prime locations into landmark addresses that redefine luxury living.

properties.title: Malibu Cliffside Residences

heroImage.altText: Malibu Cliffside Residences overlooking the Pacific Ocean

gallery.altText: Exterior view of Malibu residence at dusk
Open-plan living room with ocean views

properties.description: Perched above the Pacific on a private cliff face, Malibu Cliffside Residences represents the pinnacle of California coastal living. Six ensuite bedrooms flow through an open-plan architecture of board-form concrete and floor-to-ceiling glass. A seamless indoor-outdoor living experience, with an infinity pool cantilevered over the ocean and a private beach path.

properties.title: Bel Air Modern Estate

heroImage.altText: Bel Air Modern Estate aerial view

gallery.altText: Front facade of Bel Air Estate

properties.description: Set on over an acre in the exclusive Bel Air hillside, this 12,400-square-foot estate commands panoramic views of the Los Angeles basin. The architect-designed residence features a dramatic double-height entry, a professional chef's kitchen, wine cellar, home theater, spa, and a resort-worthy pool terrace surrounded by mature olive groves.

properties.title: Santa Barbara Vineyard Compound

heroImage.altText: Santa Barbara vineyard compound at golden hour

gallery.altText: Courtyard with fountain and mature landscaping

properties.description: A private compound spanning eight acres of working vineyard in the Santa Ynez foothills. The main residence pays homage to the region's Spanish-Colonial heritage with arched loggias, terracotta roofing, and hand-laid Saltillo tile — reinterpreted with thoroughly modern interiors. Includes a 3-acre Pinot Noir vineyard, guest casita, and 3-car garage with wine cellar.

properties.title: Silver Lake Glass Pavilion

heroImage.altText: Silver Lake Glass Pavilion architectural rendering

properties.description: An upcoming architectural statement in Silver Lake's most coveted hillside pocket. The design centers on a single transparent volume of structural glass and weathered steel, positioned to maximize the iconic reservoir views. Currently in entitlement phase — projected delivery Q3 2026. Early interest contact available.

places.name: Malibu Coast
places.description: Oceanfront luxury along 27 miles of pristine Pacific coastline. Malibu represents the pinnacle of California coastal living, with exclusive gated communities, private beach access, and unobstructed ocean views. Home to some of the most architecturally significant residences in the world.

gallery.altText: Malibu coastal cliffs and rock formations

places.name: Beverly Hills
places.description: The epitome of Los Angeles luxury, Beverly Hills offers unparalleled prestige and privacy. Tree-lined streets, gated estates, and proximity to world-class dining and shopping define this iconic neighborhood. Home to Hollywood's elite and international high-net-worth individuals.

places.name: Pacific Palisades
places.description: Perched above the Pacific Ocean, Pacific Palisades combines coastal beauty with hillside sophistication. Dramatic bluff-top properties offer panoramic ocean views, while the neighborhood maintains a relaxed, community-oriented atmosphere. Perfect for those seeking both luxury and lifestyle.

gallery.altText: Ocean view estates in Pacific Palisades

places.name: Newport Beach
places.description: Orange County's premier coastal destination, Newport Beach offers waterfront living at its finest. Bayfront estates, yacht clubs, and pristine beaches create an exclusive enclave for discerning buyers. Known for its sophisticated community and world-class amenities.

places.name: San Francisco Heights
places.description: San Francisco's most prestigious neighborhoods offer iconic architecture, cultural sophistication, and unparalleled city views. From Pacific Heights to Twin Peaks, these elevated addresses command some of the highest valuations in the nation. Urban luxury at its finest.

places.name: Carmel-by-the-Sea
places.description: A picturesque coastal village on the Big Sur coast, Carmel-by-the-Sea combines artistic heritage with natural beauty. Charming cottages and contemporary estates nestle among cypress groves overlooking dramatic cliffs and pristine beaches. An exclusive retreat for the culturally refined.

media.title: Architectural Digest Features Our Latest Development
media.description: An in-depth look at our hillside compound project, exploring the intersection of architectural innovation and luxury living. The feature highlights our design philosophy and commitment to creating timeless residences.

media.title: Virtual Tour: Malibu Cliffside Residences
media.description: Experience the stunning Malibu Cliffside Residences through an immersive virtual tour. Explore every room, from the dramatic entry to the oceanfront master suite, and discover the seamless indoor-outdoor living experience.

media.title: 2024 California Luxury Real Estate Market Report
media.description: Our comprehensive analysis of the luxury real estate market across California's premier locations. Includes market trends, price appreciation data, and investment insights for high-net-worth individuals.

media.title: From Vision to Reality: Our Development Process
media.description: A behind-the-scenes documentary showcasing our development methodology, from site selection and architectural design through construction and final delivery. Featuring interviews with our team and project stakeholders.

media.title: Forbes Interview: The Future of Luxury Development
media.description: Our founder discusses the evolving landscape of luxury real estate development, investment trends, and the importance of architectural integrity in creating lasting value.

media.title: The Investor's Guide to California Coastal Properties
media.description: A detailed guide for investors considering coastal real estate acquisitions. Covers market dynamics, location analysis, and long-term value appreciation strategies for premium oceanfront properties.

media.title: Luxury Living Trends 2024: What High-Net-Worth Buyers Want
media.description: An analysis of emerging preferences among luxury buyers, including smart home integration, wellness amenities, and sustainable design. Insights from our sales team and market research.

media.title: Architectural Innovation: Pushing Design Boundaries
media.description: A visual exploration of our most innovative architectural projects, showcasing cutting-edge design techniques, sustainable materials, and the integration of technology in luxury residential spaces.

media.title: Sustainability in Luxury Development: A Case Study
media.description: An examination of how we integrate sustainable practices and eco-friendly materials into luxury developments without compromising on aesthetics or performance. Includes LEED certification details and environmental impact analysis.
